card.name: Thriving Moor
card.text: This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than black. {T}: Add {B} or one mana of the chosen color.

card.name: Envoy of Kozilek
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Whenever Envoy of Kozilek attacks, defending player loses 3 life unless they discard a card or sacrifice a nonland permanent.

card.name: Eldrazi Herald
card.text: Annihilator 1 (Whenever that creature attacks, defending player sacrifices a permanent.) {2}: Put target card from a graveyard on the bottom of its owner's library. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Caller of the Beyond
card.text: Ingest (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player exiles the top card of their library.) {2}: You may cast a spell exiled with Caller of the Beyond this turn and spend mana as though it was mana of any type to cast it.

card.name: Essence Siphon
card.text: Fateseal 2. (Look at the top two cards of an opponent's library, then put any number of them on the bottom of that player's library and the rest on top in any order.) Exile the top two cards of target opponent's library. You may play those cards for as long as they remain exiled and spend mana as though it was mana of any type to cast them.

card.name: Ghoulcaller Witch
card.text: Haunt (When this creature dies, exile it haunting target creature.) Whenever Ghoulcaller Witch or the creature it haunts attacks, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Ghoulish Feast
card.text: If this spell was cast for its miracle cost, create two 2/2 black Zombie creature tokens. Each player sacrifices a creature of their choice. Miracle {3}{B} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Infernal Spawn
card.text: Deathtouch Forecast — {2}{B}, Reveal Infernal Spawn from your hand: Target opponent loses 2 life. (Activate only during your upkeep and only once each turn.)

card.name: Mite Mob
card.text: {B}{P}: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. Activate only once. ({P} can be paid with either {B} or 2 life.)

card.name: Phyrexian Eradicator
card.text: Menace, deathtouch (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures. Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.) Toxic 5 (Players dealt combat damage by this creature also get five poison counters.)

card.name: Soothsayer's Communion
card.text: You draw two cards and lose 2 life. Fateful Hour — If you have five or less life, instead you draw two cards and each opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: Spirit Leech
card.text: Provoke (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block it if able.) Decayed (This creature can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat)

card.name: Tear Apart
card.text: Destroy target creature [with mana value 3 or less.] Cleave {3}{B} (You may cast this spell for its cleave cost. If you do, remove the words in square brackets.)

card.name: Thriving Grove
card.text: This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than green. {T}: Add {G} or one mana of the chosen color.

card.name: Ambitious Cub
card.text: Ward {1} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.) Whenever this creature mutates, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Apex Presence
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, draw a card. {4}{G}: Apex Presence becomes a 5/5 Snake creature with trample in addition to its other types.

card.name: Devoted Gnarr
card.text: Amalgamate {1}{G} (If you cast this spell for its amalgamate cost, put it over or under target creature you own. They mutate into the creature on top plus all abilities from under it.) Reach Whenever this creature mutates, create a 2/2 green Beast creature token.

card.name: Frilled Hoothoof
card.text: Amalgamate {3}{G} (If you cast this spell for its amalgamate cost, put it over or under target creature you own. They mutate into the creature on top plus all abilities from under it.) Trample Whenever this creature mutates, put two +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Lily-Goose
card.text: Amalgamate {G} (If you cast this spell for its amalgamate cost, put it over or under target creature you own. They mutate into the creature on top plus all abilities from under it.) {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Return to Nature
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment. • Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Sabertooth Bonder
card.text: Sabertooth Bonder can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. {4}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on Sabertooth Bonder. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Semich, Apex of Tommorow
card.text: Trample Whenever you cast a spell for its mutate or amalgamate cost, if it targets a single creature other than Semich, you may copy that spell. The copy targets Semich. (Copies of permanent spells become tokens.)

card.name: Timberwolf
card.text: Amalgamate {4}{G}{G} (If you cast this spell for its amalgamate cost, put it over or under target creature you own. They mutate into the creature on top plus all abilities from under it.) Whenever this creature mutates, you may have it fight target creature. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

card.name: Unlikely Bond
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If it's mutated, it gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Verdant Drakkis
card.text: Amalgamate {3}{G}{G} (If you cast this spell for its amalgamate cost, put it over or under target creature you own. They mutate into the creature on top plus all abilities from under it.) Whenever this creature mutates, discover 3. (Exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with mana value 3 or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: Chromatic Hippo
card.text: Amalgamate {2}{G}{G} (If you cast this spell for its amalgamate cost, put it over or under target creature you own. They mutate into the creature on top plus all abilities from under it.) Chromatic Hippo is all colors. Whenever this creature mutates, return target card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Thriving Bluff
card.text: This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than red. {T}: Add {R} or one mana of the chosen color.

card.name: Junk DMAJ
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Animals Clan Rider
card.text: Start your engines! (If you have no speed, it starts at 1. It increases once on each of your turns when an opponent loses life. Max speed is 4.) Other creatures you control have haste. Max speed — This creature has menace.

card.name: Badland Clan
card.text: Haste Start your engines! (If you have no speed, it starts at 1. It increases once on each of your turns when an opponent loses life. Max speed is 4.) Max speed — Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Human creature token that's tapped and attacking.

card.name: Broadside Boarder
card.text: Start your engines! (If you have no speed, it starts at 1. It increases once on each of your turns when an opponent loses life. Max speed is 4.) Broadside Boarder gets +X/+0, where X is your speed.

card.name: Daring Trailblazer
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, another target creature you control gains your choice of haste or menace until end of turn.

card.name: Firefight
card.text: If you have max speed, damage can't be prevented this turn. Firefight deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Frag
card.text: Choose one — • Frag deals 4 damage to target creature. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: High-Speed Chase
card.text: Start your engines! (If you have no speed, it starts at 1. It increases once on each of your turns when an opponent loses life. Max speed is 4.) Whenever you attack, target creature you control with power less than or equal to your speed can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Junker Knights
card.text: Trample Other creatures you control have trample.

card.name: Unwelcome Boarding
card.text: Target creature gets +3/+1 until end of turn. Create a Junk token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Wasteland Motorist
card.text: Start your engines! (If you have no speed, it starts at 1. It increases once on each of your turns when an opponent loses life. Max speed is 4.) Max speed — Whenever you attack, exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn.

card.name: Wildlands Nomad
card.text: Start your engines! (If you have no speed, it starts at 1. It increases once on each of your turns when an opponent loses life. Max speed is 4.) Max speed — Wildlands Nomad gets +1/+1.

card.name: Wreckage Scavenger
card.text: Menace Whenever you attack, you may discard a card. If you do, create a Junk token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.")
